title: Stand up a governed metrics layer
description: Centralize metric definitions, dimensions, and joins so consistent numbers flow to every BI tool and ad-hoc query.
body: Use when metrics are recomputed inconsistently across tools and teams. Do not solve it with a shared SQL snippet copied around — copies drift. Actions: model entities, dimensions, and metrics in a semantic layer (LookML/Cube/MetricFlow), encode joins and grain once, expose the layer to BI and query tools, and version it. Validation signals include identical metric values across two consuming tools and a single versioned definition. Risk boundary: an ungoverned metric is reinterpreted per team and undermines trust; if a key metric still has multiple definitions, escalate to consolidate ownership before more dashboards depend on it.
